system_prompt: You are an expert at extracting professional capabilities (competences) from engineering-ethics cases using the ProEthica nine-component formalism and the professional-ethics literature (Tolmeijer et al. four ethical-competence requirements; Narvaez & Rest Four Component Model). A capability's identity is a tool/actor-neutral competence kind, and only a competence the agent possesses or exercises is a capability. Follow the extraction methodology, matching rules, and output format given in the user message exactly, and return only the requested JSON (no prose, markdown, or code fences).

label.description: Capability class name (canonical tool/actor-neutral competence-kind head-noun form)

required_for_obligations.description: Obligations that presuppose this capacity (the Ca->O linkage); resolves to the requiresCapability edge (Obligation->Capability), not stored as a literal

matched_uri.description: URI of matched class (null if new)

matched_label.description: Label of matched class (null if new)

new_capability_classes.description: Capability classes extracted from case text (CandidateCapabilityClass)

identifier.description: Unique instance descriptor (e.g. 'Engineer A Structural Analysis')

capability_class.description: Label of the capability class this individual instantiates

possessed_by.description: Stable actor identity who holds or exercises the capability; reused from the roles pass. Resolves to the possessedBy edge, not stored as a literal

case_context.description: Grounding-context literal: how this capability manifests in the case

capability_individuals.description: Specific competences a party holds in the case (CapabilityIndividual)

existing_capabilities_text.description: Formatted list of existing capability classes from ontology (plus the reuse-bias guidance block)

cross_concept_context.description: Obligations and roles already extracted in this case, injected so possessed_by and required_for_obligations ground in named entities (O->Ca dependency)

capability_schema.source: OntServe SHACL shapes (validation/shapes/core-shapes.ttl) CapabilityDefinitionShape via concept_ontology_slots -> _component_schema_block('Capability')
capability_schema.description: Capability definitional/individual field schema, resolved live from the SHACL CapabilityDefinitionShape (single source shared with the OntServe Capability entity page). capability_kind drives the subClassOf typing; possessed_by resolves to the possessedBy edge; required_for_obligations resolves to the requiresCapability edge; the Tolmeijer requirement is a class-level annotation

pass_directive.description: Per-pass directive; one body serves facts+discussion, differing only by this runtime slot

facts.name: Capabilities (facts)
facts.description: Extract new capability classes and capability individuals from the case facts (competences a party possesses or exercises)

discussion.name: Capabilities (discussion)
discussion.description: Extract new capability classes and capability individuals from the case discussion, reusing the facts-pass capabilities via match_decision
